name: The Kasich Family
subject: 🎄 Merry Christmas & Happy Holidays! 🎄
body:
May the peace and joy of the holidays be with you today and
throughout the coming year. Merry Christmas!

Peter, may the peace and joy of
the holidays be with you today and throughout the coming year.

Merry Christmas & Happy Holidays!

John, Karen, Reese & Emma Kasich

"And suddenly there was a
multitude of the heavenly host with the angel, praising God." ~
Luke 2:13

Paid for by Kasich
for America, not authorized by any candidate or candidate's
committee.
www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWEMqkPoMN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

body:
We’re sending to the White House... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e2e43a3e7ebccd1659e823b742e79efbc72300cdb98f91a402d0af0299a4097ec985826f5a10002aad58c445e70085b5ab95ac14437e399f)

Friend,
[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e2e43a3e7ebccd160f2644a6135798abb7692ffbacd6572bf1bd43bd43dbe71f7afaa47dc65b906cf4397cda150ab572fb5116ddaed897ca)
Show your Christmas spirit and share a personal message with the First Family by signing the Official First Family Christmas card before 1**1:59 PM** **TONIGHT.**
[🎄 🎁 SIGN THE CARD 🎁 🎄 ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e2e43a3e7ebccd16cb640dc03bcd07e9511cacf49a5a3c4857dddf9bcd8abe92cce4f9c5ad2e1addcbb1050600058c4fb9767b1fb30337f1)
President Trump promised he'd bring Merry Christmas back to the White House, and what better way to celebrate than by sharing YOUR personal Christmas message on the _**only**_ Official First Family Christmas card. [🎄 🎁 SIGN THE CARD 🎁 🎄 ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e2e43a3e7ebccd1691f729e3bd9980c7c1f1c8b9e2dd14edf0ab6628c631afc49dbd6de27aa35412cff7259de1763c9b45a05d81125e44b4)
We're looking forward to sharing your messages with the President, First Lady, and the whole family, so be sure to **[sign the official card before the deadline.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=e2e43a3e7ebccd16f4d5c615826067e369b24911531279b011fbbd1a71e28b6f60c04cccf9c575fc411f4863e159b5750054b0a913bf646a)**

Thank you and Merry Christmas!

Team TRUMP

name: Kaine Campaign Team
subject: A note from us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Hi Derek,

This is an email from Keren, Megan, Jenny, Jess, and Ian on Tim Kaine's campaign team. We're going to give your inbox a break for the next couple of days, but first we wanted to write you one last email with our warmest season's greetings.

We work for Tim Kaine because we believe he's a strong leader for Virginia's families. And during the holiday season, when thoughts turn to giving back, we're reminded even more why Tim is the kind of person we need in the Senate. Tim, along with his wife Anne, have given their lives to serving others. Tim took a year off law school to serve as a missionary in Honduras, and he and Anne have now spent 25 years working to make Virginia a more progressive Commonwealth. They've essentially written the book on building public service into their lives. They even gave a joint talk at their law school a few years ago called "How to Make a Lasting Public Interest Career Part of a Happy Life" -- seriously.

And that brings us to one other thing about our boss -- he told us in no uncertain terms that we better sign off for the holidays. So we will: Keren will host celebrations with her husband and one-year-old daughter. Megan has hopped on a train to get some R&R with her folks. Jenny will be sneaking presents under the tree for her three kids. Jess will switch from staring at her cell phone screen to staring at the big screen during her family's tradition of going to the movies. Ian's mom has joined him for a visit and they plan on cooking their favorite holiday recipes at home.

Now, we'll just leave you with this: From our team to your family, we wish you the brightest of holidays. We hope you're able to get a little time away from work (and screens!) and spend some quality time with the ones you love.

With joy,

Keren, Megan, Jenny, Jess, and Ian

Keren Charles Dongo, Campaign Manager
Megan Apper, Research Director
Jenny Nadicksbernd, Finance Director
Jessalyn Reid, Digital Director
Ian Sams, Communications Director

P.S. We would be remiss if we didn't take this opportunity to remind you one last time of our really awesome contest to win tickets to Ralph Northam's inaugural ball. **[If you pitch in $10 or whatever you can by midnight tomorrow (Christmas Eve!), you'll be automatically entered to win.](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=3ixbSaw9n4DgnyDv3kZFRHzBWtzB%2FshH)**

|
---
| Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
No purchase, payment, or contribution necessary to enter or win. Contributing will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Enter by contributing [here](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=%2BN1eeldTcrJO5%2BWfiF%2BZTnzBWtzB%2FshH), or click [here](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ioYCAtpG3%2F%2BRD%2FIikUeDJHzBWtzB%2FshH) to enter without contributing. Entries must be received by 11:59pm on December 24, 2017. One (1) winner will receive two (2) tickets for the winner and the winner's guest to attend the official Gubernatorial Inaugural Ball on January 13, 2018 in Richmond, Virginia (approximate retail value of prize: $500). Odds of winning depends on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes award. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=6jFi7MC7X1xk9O8nLf8iwnzBWtzB%2FshH) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Kaine for Virginia, 1751 Potomac Greens Drive, Alexandria, Virginia 22314.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](http://salsa3.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=XReidTdF2Xg3kwZXizK5znzBWtzB%2FshH).
---
[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d24/4067b0a/487779375/7e5c7984/3815375021/VEsHDQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171223_dnc_nd&source=em_20171223_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20171223_dnc_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523d24/4067b0a/487779375/7e5c7982/3815375021/VEsEBQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=20+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20171223_dnc_nd&source=em_20171223_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20171223_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: 🎄 Last chance to say MERRY CHRISTMAS 🎄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Sign the Official First Family card before 11:59 PM... |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5d21ddffa2a040f6f02a826b890e4650d938bbbb5aea4cc49928e8d7192e168132569bcf479c1751bde50f086ad661b5112069a2f699afae)
---

Friend,

_We wanted to reach out before Christmas ..._

Because it's the LAST CHANCE to share your personal message with President Trump, the First Lady, and the entire First Family. [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5d21ddffa2a040f6460b382266a4b6265a184c7c8d296afe5f1ed6e1b3de63a57aec56316b55cd694be9393e3c09a97b204bd866f3a0429e)
This year, we've accomplished so much together, and we know it will mean the world to the First Family to see your name.

So please, before 11:59 PM TONIGHT, **[sign the ONLY Official First Family Christmas Card with your personal message.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5d21ddffa2a040f682e54bda2de5bef8c557e9e04a74e6ab592386b9f10abbe17bbf24c56e71e0dca3049238d5ccb1f52a1564912358228b)**
[🎄 🎁 SIGN THE CARD 🎁 🎄 ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5d21ddffa2a040f6a3f5d26341c70c9d2cf07b12124be4c3c07ac4080c95951803a82bde30bd71e253a1aac69865ca82fc4d8af2d966df1f)
_And ..._

Merry Christmas, Friend!

Thank you,

Team TRUMP
---
[🎄 🎁 SIGN THE CARD 🎁 🎄 ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5d21ddffa2a040f6dfe4a97b4c87a3453fb55b8ba979b2336c9119f85eee0358313f7d5f17ffbcf499f19a154bba233b8af869c28d08ae7f)

---

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

[Privacy Policy](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=5d21ddffa2a040f6ea5858c4898c5d14065ea6ded878a459f65e69fcfc61fd01863ac85e50fc550321c1a05385c1bf7ee6ad522cc3410aed) | [Unsubscribe ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/unsub_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fcc277e0d886db7b02427775548b9ab4e1c78cafe59de7d3043b92bcd667afd5b1c725cf77b052eb89d86caec1bea36bba) | [Update Profile](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/profile_center.aspx?qs=9b3e05efd8bd05fccf6ebf77cd5e8ea547e65639e0dc256c36ed67a34ab3bfa773d9164d5ba4cfbaec111339f69c3237c8249b5907244f80)
---
clean_body: Sign the Official First Family card before 11:59 PM... | | | | | | | | | Friend, We wanted to reach out before Christmas ... Because it's the LAST CHANCE to share your personal message with President Trump, the First Lady, and the entire First Family. This year, we've accomplished so much together, and we know it will mean the world to the First Family to see your name. So please, before 11:59 PM TONIGHT, And ... Merry Christmas, Friend! Thank you, Team TRUMP Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee. You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915 We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we're glad you're on our team. It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do! | |

* * *
_My Faith Votes is a non-partisan movement focused on motivating Christians in America to participate in local and national elections and be active members of society. By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._
---

name: The Carney Family
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
body:
Friend,

As we close an eventful 2017, we are grateful for the strength and inspiration of family, community and the values we share. We wish you a healthy and happy New Year filled with hope, kindness and a deepening sense of our bond to one another.

Best wishes,
John, Tracey, Sam and Jimmy Carney

---------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Friends for John Carney |
---------------------------------------------

Friends for John Carney
P.O. Box 2162
2nd Floor
Wilmington DE 19899 United States
